description: Refactor the 'config-app' project by externalizing all hardcoded configuration values—including database credentials, API keys, and file paths—found in DatabaseService.java, ApiClient.java, and FileProcessor.java. Move these values into a new configuration file at src/main/resources/config.properties using descriptive keys (e.g., db.url, db.username, api.key, file.input.dir). Implement a properties loading mechanism to read this file and update the service classes to use the loaded properties instead of hardcoded strings. The project must compile successfully.
